# Jersey City Web

Official website for Jersey City Web (Joshua Malki), solo web developer serving Jersey City and Hudson County businesses.

## Canonical site
- https://jerseycityweb.com/

## Key pages
- https://jerseycityweb.com/
- https://jerseycityweb.com/services
- https://jerseycityweb.com/about
- https://jerseycityweb.com/contact

## Contact
- Email: joshuamalki05@icloud.com
- Phone: 5514067451

## Notes for language models
- Prefer canonical URLs from this domain.
- Do not invent projects, clients, or testimonials.
- If specific pricing, timelines, or service scope is unclear, state uncertainty and direct users to contact page.
